ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_county" TEXT /* County where the hospital is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the hospital was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the hospital's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance measure */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance measure */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the performance measure */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the performance measure */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the performance measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the performance measure was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the performance measure's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_measures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES measure_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance measure */,
  "denominator" TEXT /* Denominator for the performance measure */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences for the performance measure */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of occurrences for the performance measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the performance data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the performance data's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES performance_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital the user is affiliated with (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access event's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data file was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data file's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the readme file was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the readme file's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report covers */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the yearly report was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the yearly report's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_reports_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance indicator */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the performance indicator */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the performance indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the indicator was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the performance indicator was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the performance indicator's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_indicators_current_value FOREIGN KEY ("current_value") REFERENCES performance_data ("percent")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id")
)
